title: Introduction to Riemannian Manifolds
pdfs: Introduction to Riemannian Manifolds, Second Edition.pdf

units.title: What Is Curvature
units.focus: Informal curvature motivation, classification theorems, local-to-global theorems, surfaces, and higher-dimensional curvature intuition.
units.label: Chapter 1

units.title: Riemannian Metrics
units.focus: Metric definitions, constructions, distances, pseudo-Riemannian metrics, and generalizations.
units.label: Chapter 2

units.title: Model Riemannian Manifolds
units.focus: Symmetries, Euclidean spaces, spheres, hyperbolic spaces, invariant Lie group metrics, homogeneous spaces, and pseudo-Riemannian models.
units.label: Chapter 3

units.title: Connections
units.focus: Differentiating vector fields, vector bundle connections, covariant derivatives, geodesics, parallel transport, and pullback connections.
units.label: Chapter 4

units.title: The Levi-Civita Connection
units.focus: Tangential connection, abstract Levi-Civita connection, exponential map, normal neighborhoods, Fermi coordinates, model-space geodesics, and geometries.
units.label: Chapter 5

units.title: Geodesics and Distance
units.focus: Minimizing curves, normal neighborhoods, completeness, distance functions, and semigeodesic coordinates.
units.label: Chapter 6

units.title: Curvature
units.focus: Curvature tensor, flat manifolds, symmetries, Ricci identities, Ricci and scalar curvature, Weyl tensor, and conformal change.
units.label: Chapter 7

units.title: Riemannian Submanifolds
units.focus: Second fundamental form, hypersurfaces, Euclidean hypersurfaces, sectional curvature, and submanifold calculations.
units.label: Chapter 8

units.title: The Gauss-Bonnet Theorem
units.focus: Plane geometry, Gauss-Bonnet formula, compact surface theorem, and curvature-topology relation.
units.label: Chapter 9

units.title: Jacobi Fields
units.focus: Jacobi equation, computations, conjugate points, second variation, cut points, and local symmetric spaces.
units.label: Chapter 10

units.title: Comparison Theory
units.focus: Jacobi fields, Hessians, Riccati equations, sectional and Ricci curvature comparisons, and volume and diameter bounds.
units.label: Chapter 11

units.title: Curvature and Topology
units.focus: Constant curvature, nonpositive curvature, positive curvature, Killing-Hopf, Cartan-Hadamard, Myers, Synge, and topology consequences.
units.label: Chapter 12

units.title: Review of Smooth Manifolds
units.focus: Topological preliminaries, smooth maps, tangent vectors, submanifolds, vector bundles, vector fields, and covering maps.
units.label: Appendix A

units.title: Review of Tensors
units.focus: Tensors, tensor bundles, differential forms, integration, and densities.
units.label: Appendix B

units.title: Review of Lie Groups
units.focus: Definitions, Lie algebras, and group actions on manifolds.
units.label: Appendix C
